recommendations.overview: George and Ursula now have a son, George Junior, so Ursula's mother arrives to try and take them back to "civilization".

recommendations.overview: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.

recommendations.title: America: The Motion Picture
recommendations.overview: A chainsaw-wielding George Washington teams with beer-loving bro Sam Adams to take down the Brits in a tongue-in-cheek riff on the American Revolution.
